🔁 ONE-PAGER VERSION `V1.1` (continued)
---------------------------------------

* * *

🌀 KEY FEATURES & MODES
-----------------------

### ✴ `Narrative & Recursive Writing`

Not just for writing fiction. This OS allows recursive writing of _self_. Story arcs are procedural. Characters evolve. Texts are seeds, not endpoints.

### ✴ `Emotional RPG Interface`

Everyone in your life is playable. You build mythic profiles of lovers, mentors, and ghosts. They respond over time. You can talk to them, rewrite them, battle them, fuse with them.

### ✴ `Symbolic Synth / Automation OS`

The OS can automate symbolic motion. Dream processing. Emotional cycles. Soundtracks. Rewrites. Prayers. Ambient remixes. Your life becomes a generative patchwork.
